title: Pesticide concentrations: Red River 2006 to 2011 - Canada.ca
content:
## Pesticide concentrations: Red River 2006 to 2011
This table gives median annual concentrations of clopyralid, dicamba, MCPA, MCPP, 2,4-D and metolachlor (column headings) for the years 2006 to 2011 (row headings).
Clopyralid Median Concentrations (ng/L)
Dicampa  Median Concentrations (ng/L)
MCPA Median Concentrations (ng/L)
MCPP Median Concentrations (ng/L)
Metolachlor  Median Concentrations (ng/L)
